ideation: This animation sequence simulates the careful and precise action of injecting something with a syringe.  The robot will use its right arm to hold and manipulate the syringe, while the left arm remains mostly still for balance. The sequence starts with the arm extended, mimicking the approach to the injection site. Then the arm moves closer, and the hand rotates to simulate the injection process before returning to a resting position.  The movement is slow and deliberate, emphasizing the precision needed for an injection.

frames.beat: right arm extends, ready for the injection
the right arm moves closer, preparing to pierce
the syringe is twisted in, a quick, precise jab
the needle withdraws, arm returns to rest
